channel.title: SPL - Online Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Online Events

item.title: Virtual Writers Read
item.description:
Sunday, March 8, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Online

Join us for a monthly reading series featuring an open mic and selected author readings from local writers.

Event details

item.title: Virtual Intellectual Property Law Consults for Artists
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Online

We offer assistance for small business or nonprofits that need help navigating intellectual property issues, such as patents, copyright or trademarks.

Event details

item.title: Virtual Citizenship Class - English
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Online

This class is designed for individuals that need assistance in preparing for their citizenship exam.

Event details

item.title: Virtual Citizenship Class - English
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Online

This class is designed for individuals that need assistance in preparing for their citizenship exam.

Event details

item.title: Virtual & In-Person Citizenship Class - English & Vietnamese
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 9 AM

Location: Online

Lớp học này được tạo ra dành cho những người cần giúp đỡ để chuẩn bị cho bài thi quốc tịch của họ.Chương trình song ngữ bằng tiếng Việt và tiếng Anh.---------------------------------------This class is designed for individuals that need assistance in preparing for their citizenship exam.Bilingual event in Vietnamese/English.

Event details

item.title: Virtual & In-Person Citizenship Class - English & Vietnamese
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Online

Lớp học này được tạo ra dành cho những người cần giúp đỡ để chuẩn bị cho bài thi quốc tịch của họ.Chương trình song ngữ bằng tiếng Việt và tiếng Anh.---------------------------------------This class is designed for individuals that need assistance in preparing for their citizenship exam.Bilingual event in Vietnamese/English.

Event details

item.title: Virtual English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Online

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.مارس لغتك الإنجليزية.دینک نیرمت ار دوخ یسیلگنا.ئړک نیرمت يسیلګنا هلپخПрактикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Virtual Workshop - Entrepreneurial Career Options
item.description:
Monday, March 16, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Online

If you have or are considering being in your own business, whether it is a startup, acquisition of an existing business or franchise, this seminar is for you.  

Event details
